reviews.review_description: If you have static excersise bike give this a try for free you can't go wrong  just wish you could change music and would be nice to have more varied tracks
I enjoy the app but would be nice to change some settings?

I like all the features of of the app. It gives me a great workout which is fun and exhilarating. I can bike for miles on my Schwinn Airdyne bike down a meandering road with beautiful scenery of the island. I look forward to cycling every day and tracking my time and progress. I hope the developer will create this app for the platform of Quest 2 so that I can continue my road adventure.

I like it.  I use it to walk in place.  I get my steps in and I don’t get bored.  This could definitely become an awesome exercise app.  There are lots of things that could be done to improve it but for a freebie, it’s great!
Love the view and good for exercise
